design_philosophy: A confident, opinionated SaaS tool for marketers. The app shell is strict, grid-based, and monochrome with sharp borders (Swiss Brutalist), letting the generated landing pages stand out as the 'art'.

spacing_and_layout.app_shell_grid: The 'Control Room' Grid - grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6. Dashboard uses a sidebar (col-span-3) and main content (col-span-9).
spacing_and_layout.container_padding: p-8 or p-12 for generous breathing room
spacing_and_layout.card_style: Flat background (#FFFFFF), 1px solid border (#E5E5E5), rounded-none. On hover: -translate-y-1, shadow-lg, border-black.

components.buttons: Square edges (rounded-none), solid black or accent background, white text. Data-testid mandatory.
components.inputs: Shadcn components heavily customized: 1px solid border, no rounded corners, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black.
components.ai_generator_state: Retro-Futurism 'Terminal' look for loading states: deep black background, green scanlines, typewriter text effect.
components.live_preview: Housed inside a bento-grid slot with a distinct browser-mockup header (macOS dots) to differentiate app shell from generated content.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Crisp and immediate. Elements lift (-translate-y-1) and gain a sharp drop shadow.
motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Instant or very fast fade (0.15s ease).
motion_and_interaction.loading: Meaningful animations for AI generation, showing steps (Drafting copy -> Assembling sections -> Polishing).
motion_and_interaction.accessibility: Always respect prefers-reduced-motion. High contrast focus rings.

modern.name: Modern Glass
modern.style: Soft shadows, max rounded corners (rounded-2xl), subtle gradients, glassmorphism headers.

bold.name: Brutalist Bold
bold.style: High contrast, massive typography, 2px hard borders, harsh shadows (offset solid black shadows).

minimal.name: Editorial Minimal
minimal.style: Massive whitespace (py-32), delicate 1px dividers, highly muted color palette.

instructions_to_main_agent: Import Cabinet Grotesk and Satoshi from Fontshare CDN in your HTML head.
Build the dashboard and settings using strict Grid layouts. Do not use generic Shadcn Cards without removing the heavy border-radius and default soft shadows to match the Brutalist aesthetic.
For the AI Generator UI, use a split-screen or bento grid: Left side is the input form (Product Name, Audience, etc.), Right side is the Live Preview.
The Live Preview must be an iframe-like container or a clearly bounded div with a 'browser chrome' (e.g., traffic light dots) to isolate the generated template from the app shell.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='generate-sales-page-btn').
Use @phosphor-icons/react for a dense, professional look.
Create the 3 distinct templates inside separate React components that accept props (headline, subheadline, features, etc.). Ensure they match the 'generated_templates_spec' distinct styles.
